---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the methodology, templates, or documentation is wrong, broken, or contradictory
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## What's wrong

Describe what you found. Be specific about the file or section.

## Where it is

Path to the file or files involved. Line numbers help if you have them.

## What you expected

What you thought the document or template was telling you to do.

## What actually happens

What the document or template actually says, or what happens when you follow it literally.

## How to reproduce

If this is something that shows up when you follow the methodology in a real project, walk through the steps that surfaced it.

## Suggested fix

Optional. If you have a proposed wording change or correction, include it here. Pull requests are welcome — see CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Environment

- FSE version or commit hash:
- Stack you're applying it to (if relevant):
- Tooling involved (Claude, Cursor, Copilot, plain editor, etc.):

## Anything else

Screenshots, logs, links to your own repo if it's public, or anything else that helps us see what you're seeing.
